channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania's Political Tensions: Opposition and Government Clash Over Policies
item.description: Tanzania's opposition leader Tundu Lissu has intensified criticisms against the government, prompting swift rebuttals from officials defending President Samia Suluhu Hassan's administration. The polit...

item.title: Parents Arrested for Allegedly Forcing Son to Drink Acid and Strangle Him in Gujarat Murder Case
item.description: A 26-year-old man's alleged suicide in Rajkot, Gujarat, has been reclassified as murder after an autopsy revealed he died from strangulation. Police arrested his parents, Babubhai and Manishaben Bambv...

item.title: MC Chris Shares Heartbreaking Loss of Daughter Amid Rumors
item.description: Renowned Kenyan TikToker MC Chris Kirubi Junior has opened up about the tragic loss of his daughter, sharing an emotional message on social media to clarify rumors surrounding her death. While initial...

item.title: Taylor Swift's wedding: A star-studded celebration of fashion and celebrity
item.description: The article details the extravagant wedding of Taylor Swift, highlighting the fashion choices of prominent guests such as Gigi Hadid, Bradley Cooper, and Selena Gomez. It describes the opulent setting...

item.title: Fire Destroys Parking Lot Near Wilmington Motel, Authorities Investigate Cause
item.description: Authorities are investigating a fire that broke out Friday night at a parking lot near a Wilmington motel, where multiple vehicles were found engulfed in flames. The Los Angeles Fire Department (LAFD)...

item.title: Horoscope for July 4, 2026: Insights for Each Zodiac Sign
item.description: The article provides daily horoscope predictions for July 4, 2026, tailored to each zodiac sign. Aries experiences a surge of energy from Mars and Uranus alignment, encouraging bold action. Taurus is ...

item.title: Scientists Create Synthetic Cell with Key Life Functions in Lab
item.description: Researchers at the University of Minnesota have developed a synthetic cell called SpudCell, which demonstrates fundamental life processes such as growth, DNA replication, division, and trait inheritan...

item.title: LHC rules courts must assess full context in marriage dispute cases
item.description: The Lahore High Court (LHC) has issued a landmark ruling stating that courts cannot rely solely on documentary evidence like nikahnama (marriage certificates) to resolve marriage disputes. In a case i...

item.description: Women in Technology and Innovation Africa (WITIA) has launched the Mbukoni Smart Library at Mbukoni Comprehensive School in Machakos, marking a significant step in bridging Kenya's digital divide. Thi...

item.title: Rockstar Games faces criticism over workplace practices and pay disparities
item.description: Rockstar Games, the developer behind the upcoming GTA 6, is facing allegations from union members regarding unfair workplace practices. The Rockstar Game Workers Union (RGWU) claims the studio enables...

item.title: Black Market Dollar to Naira Exchange Rate for July 4th, 2026

item.title: Luo Musician Tony Ndiema's Partner Shares Heartbreaking Tribute After His Passing
item.description: Christine Milan, the long-term partner of late Luo musician Tony Ndiema, has shared a deeply emotional tribute on TikTok days after his death. The video, set to a somber song, features memories of the...

item.title: South African Commercial Property Shows Resilience with Four Years of Growth
item.description: South African commercial property has achieved four consecutive years of positive capital growth, defying pandemic uncertainties and setting the stage for a robust recovery. The MSCI South Africa Prop...

item.title: Three Die in Wisconsin Lake Boat Capsizing During Storm
item.description: Three people died and seven others were rescued after a boat capsized on Geneva Lake in Wisconsin during a severe storm, according to officials. The incident occurred on Friday as a strong storm swept...

item.title: Argentina and Egypt Advance in World Cup Group Stage
item.description: In a thrilling World Cup encounter, Argentina overcame a challenging match against Cape Verde to secure their position in the knockout rounds. The game, held in a remote venue, saw Argentina's resilie...

item.title: Analysis of One Nation's Funding Shows Surging Support from Donors
